rationale: Section 25.20 governs taxing unit access to appraisal records. Increasing the homestead exemption amount under §11.13(b) does not affect access provisions or require any amendment to this section.
quote: The chief appraiser shall give the assessor for a taxing unit in the district reasonable access to the appraisal records at any time.
_note: No conflict identified. §25.20 concerns access to appraisal records, not exemption amounts or appraisal methodology.
